creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 23 Apr 2000 will@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Kris, the new SSH maintainer, can probably answer my question for feedback.

Actually it looks like a deficiency in SSH itself, not a problem with our
port. However given that ssh-1 is not being actively developed any longer,
your best bet would be to talk to the OpenSSH developers about doing this
in their code, which will then make its way into FreeBSD.

I'm going to close this PR in a few days because without actual code to
implement this change nothing can be done.

Kris

----
In God we Trust -- all others must submit an X.509 certificate.
    -- Charles Forsythe <forsythe@alum.mit.edu>
